name: The &RL&ribrary&n
description:
Here you stand in a great library.  At your side you see many bookcases with
magical and theorical books.  Here is the history of the &YH&welm&Y'&ws
&YD&weep&n and you can see it looking to the &Wdeeds&n on the wall.  There is
also a Board, where you can write to the rest of the fortress.  I'm sure that
the comments will be wise.
